## Entities.Confections.AnyResolvedFillingSlot type

Union of resolved filling slot types. Discriminated on the `slotType` field.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyResolvedFillingSlot = IResolvedFillingSlot | IResolvedIngredientSlot;
```
